app.title: Trip calculator
app.subtitle: Estimate fuel cost for a route in Ukraine
language.label: Language
map.title: Route map
map.hint: Set points A and B using the search fields or click the map in the selected mode (A, B, or a stop between them).
map.needKey: Add your OpenRouteService API key to .env (see README) to build routes and use search.
map.needTwoPoints: At least two points are required
meta.description: Fuel cost calculator for your trip
